panel.textContent: Garden of GethsemaneOlive trees rustle in a warm evening breeze. Distant crickets and gentle wind carry you into the quiet place where Jesus prayed.Still WatersBeside quiet waters, your soul finds rest. A gentle stream flows through green pastures under a soft sky.Midnight RainRain patters against the window as the world sleeps. Wrapped in warmth, you listen to the rhythm of the night.All ScenesGa
